              Math.min(rawMin.z, rawMax.z),
            ),
            max: new THREE.Vector3(
              Math.max(rawMin.x, rawMax.x),
              Math.max(rawMin.y, rawMax.y),
              Math.max(rawMin.z, rawMax.z),
            ),
          };
        }

        const bounds = transformedBounds(payload.bounds || {});
        const minBound = bounds.min;
        const maxBound = bounds.max;
        const center = new THREE.Vector3()
          .addVectors(minBound, maxBound)
          .multiplyScalar(0.5);
        const span = new THREE.Vector3().subVectors(maxBound, minBound);
        const maxSpan = Math.max(span.x, span.y, span.z, 1);
        const worldMarkerSize = Math.max(maxSpan * 0.008, 9.0);
        const axisLength = Math.max(maxSpan * 0.18, 40.0);

        function addSceneLabel(text, position, color, extraClassName, options) {
          const element = document.createElement("div");
          element.className = `scene-label ${String(extraClassName || "").trim()}`.trim();
          element.textContent = String(text || "");
          element.style.color = String(color || "#0f172a");
          labelLayerElement.appendChild(element);
          const labelItem = {
            element: element,
            position: position.clone(),
            offsetX: Number((options && options.offsetX) || 0),
            offsetY: Number((options && options.offsetY) || 0),
            visible: true,
          };
          sceneLabels.push(labelItem);
          return labelItem;
        }

        const axisOverlayDefinitions = [
          {
            key: "x",
            label: "X / East",
            color: "#B91C1C",
            vector: new THREE.Vector3(1, 0, 0),
          },
          {
            key: "y",
            label: "Y / North",
            color: "#15803D",
            vector: new THREE.Vector3(0, 1, 0),
          },
          {
            key: "z",
            label: "Z / TVD",
            color: "#1D4ED8",
            vector: new THREE.Vector3(0, 0, -1),
          },
        ];

        function updateAxesGizmo() {
          if (!axesGizmoElement) {
            return;
          }
          const width = Math.max(axesGizmoElement.clientWidth || 136, 136);
          const height = Math.max(axesGizmoElement.clientHeight || 118, 118);
          const centerX = 58;
          const centerY = 42;
          const radius = Math.min(width, height) * 0.34;
          const inverseCameraQuaternion = camera.quaternion.clone().invert();
          const axisItems = axisOverlayDefinitions.map((item) => {
            const projected = item.vector
              .clone()
              .applyQuaternion(inverseCameraQuaternion)
              .normalize();
            return {
              label: item.label,
              color: item.color,
              x: centerX + projected.x * radius,
              y: centerY - projected.y * radius,
              z: projected.z,
            };
          });
          axisItems.sort((left, right) => left.z - right.z);
          const lines = axisItems
            .map(
              (item) =>
                `<line class="axes-gizmo-line" x1="${centerX.toFixed(1)}" y1="${centerY.toFixed(1)}" x2="${item.x.toFixed(1)}" y2="${item.y.toFixed(1)}" stroke="${item.color}" opacity="${(item.z > 0 ? 1.0 : 0.72).toFixed(2)}"></line>`,
            )
            .join("");
          const labels = axisItems
            .map((item) => {
              const dx = item.x - centerX;
              const dy = item.y - centerY;
              const labelX = item.x + (Math.abs(dx) < 4 ? 0 : Math.sign(dx) * 7);
              const labelY = item.y + (Math.abs(dy) < 4 ? 0 : Math.sign(dy) * 7);
              return `<text class="axes-gizmo-label" x="${labelX.toFixed(1)}" y="${labelY.toFixed(1)}" fill="${item.color}" text-anchor="${dx >= 0 ? "start" : "end"}">${item.label}</text>`;
            })
            .join("");
          axesGizmoElement.innerHTML =
            `<svg viewBox="0 0 ${width} ${height}" aria-hidden="true">` +
            `<circle class="axes-gizmo-center" cx="${centerX.toFixed(1)}" cy="${centerY.toFixed(1)}" r="3.2"></circle>` +
            lines +
            labels +
            `</svg>`;
        }
        function resize() {
          const width = Math.max(root.clientWidth || 1, 1);
          const height = Math.max(root.clientHeight || 1, 1);
          camera.aspect = width / height;
          camera.updateProjectionMatrix();
          renderer.setSize(width, height, false);
          requestRender();
        }

        function fitCameraToRawBounds(rawBounds) {
          const localBounds = transformedBounds(rawBounds || payload.bounds || {});
          const localMin = localBounds.min;
          const localMax = localBounds.max;
          const localCenter = new THREE.Vector3()
            .addVectors(localMin, localMax)
            .multiplyScalar(0.5);
          const localSpan = new THREE.Vector3().subVectors(localMax, localMin);
          const localMaxSpan = Math.max(
            localSpan.x,
            localSpan.y,
            localSpan.z,
            1,
          );
          camera.near = Math.max(localMaxSpan / 1200.0, 0.1);
          camera.far = Math.max(localMaxSpan * 40.0, 5000.0);
          camera.up.set(0, 0, 1);
          camera.position.set(
            localCenter.x + localMaxSpan * 1.15,
            localCenter.y - localMaxSpan * 1.05,
            localCenter.z + localMaxSpan * 1.42,
          );
          controls.target.copy(localCenter);
          camera.updateProjectionMatrix();
          controls.update();
          requestRender();
        }

        function fitCamera() {
          fitCameraToRawBounds(payload.bounds || {});
        }

        function editWellTargetFocusBounds(index) {
          const wellIndex = Number(index);
          if (!Number.isInteger(wellIndex) || wellIndex < 0) {
            return null;
          }
          const well = editWells[wellIndex] || {};
          const t1 = editCurrentT1[wellIndex] || well.t1;
          const t3 = editCurrentT3[wellIndex] || well.t3;
          if (!Array.isArray(t1) || !Array.isArray(t3)) {
            return null;
          }
          const midpoint = [
            (Number(t1[0]) + Number(t3[0])) * 0.5,
            (Number(t1[1]) + Number(t3[1])) * 0.5,
            (Number(t1[2]) + Number(t3[2])) * 0.5,
          ];
          const targetLength = Math.hypot(
            Number(t3[0]) - Number(t1[0]),
            Number(t3[1]) - Number(t1[1]),
            Number(t3[2]) - Number(t1[2]),
          );
          const radius = Math.max(targetLength * 0.55, maxSpan * 0.035, 40.0);
          return {
            min: [
              midpoint[0] - radius,
              midpoint[1] - radius,
              midpoint[2] - radius,
            ],
            max: [
              midpoint[0] + radius,
              midpoint[1] + radius,
              midpoint[2] + radius,
            ],
          };
        }

        function fitCameraToEditWellTargets(index) {
          const focusBounds = editWellTargetFocusBounds(index);
          if (!focusBounds) {
            return false;
          }
          fitCameraToRawBounds(focusBounds);
          return true;
        }

        function createLegendSwatch(color, opacity) {
          const swatch = document.createElement("div");
          swatch.className = "legend-swatch";
          swatch.style.background = hexOrDefault(color, "#9ca3af");
          swatch.style.opacity = String(
            Number.isFinite(opacity) ? opacity : 1.0,
          );
          return swatch;
        }

        function createFlatLegendRow(item) {
          const row = document.createElement("div");
          row.className = "legend-item";
          row.appendChild(
            createLegendSwatch(
              item.color,
              Number.isFinite(item.opacity) ? item.opacity : 1.0,
            ),
          );
          const label = document.createElement("div");
          label.className = "legend-label";
          label.textContent = String(item.label || "");
          row.appendChild(label);
          return row;
        }

        function legendSortLabel(item) {
          return String(
            (item && (item.label || item.name || item.id)) || "",
          ).trim();
        }

        function sortedLegendItems(items) {
          return (Array.isArray(items) ? items.slice() : []).sort((left, right) =>
            legendSortLabel(left).localeCompare(legendSortLabel(right), "ru", {
              numeric: true,
              sensitivity: "base",
            }),
          );
        }

        function editableIndexForLegendItem(item) {
          const id = String((item && item.id) || "").trim();
          if (editWellIndexByName.has(id)) {
            return editWellIndexByName.get(id);
          }
          const label = String((item && item.label) || "").trim();
          if (editWellIndexByName.has(label)) {
            return editWellIndexByName.get(label);
          }
          return null;
        }

        function syncLegendEditSelection() {
          if (!legendElement) {
            return;
          }
          legendElement.querySelectorAll("[data-edit-well-index]").forEach((node) => {
            const nodeIndex = Number(node.getAttribute("data-edit-well-index"));
            node.classList.toggle(
              "is-selected-edit",
              Number.isInteger(nodeIndex) && nodeIndex === selectedEditWellIndex,
            );
          });
        }

        function createTreeNodeButton(item, kind) {
          const button = document.createElement("button");
          button.type = "button";
          button.className =
            kind === "pad"
              ? "legend-node-btn legend-node-pad"
              : "legend-node-btn legend-node-well";
          if (kind === "pad") {
            const caret = document.createElement("span");
            caret.className = "legend-caret";
            caret.textContent = legendTreeExpanded ? "▾" : "▸";
            button.appendChild(caret);
          } else {
            button.appendChild(
              createLegendSwatch(item.color, Number.isFinite(item.opacity) ? item.opacity : 1.0),
            );
          }
          const label = document.createElement("div");
          label.className = "legend-label";
          label.textContent = String(item.label || "");
          button.appendChild(label);
          const editableIndex =
            kind === "well" ? editableIndexForLegendItem(item) : null;
          if (editableIndex !== null) {
            button.classList.add("is-editable");
            button.dataset.editWellIndex = String(editableIndex);
            if (editableIndex === selectedEditWellIndex) {
              button.classList.add("is-selected-edit");
            }
          }
          button.addEventListener("click", () => {
            if (editableIndex !== null) {
              selectEditWell(editableIndex, { focus: true });
              return;
            }
            const targetBounds = focusTargets[String(item.id || "")];
            if (targetBounds) {
              fitCameraToRawBounds(targetBounds);
            }
          });
          return button;
        }

        function renderLegend() {
          legendElement.innerHTML = "";
          const flatItems = Array.isArray(payload.legend) ? payload.legend : [];
          const hasContent = hasTreeLegend || (Array.isArray(flatItems) && flatItems.length > 0);
          if (!hasContent) {
            return;
          }

          // --- Header: title + optional tree-toggle action + collapse button ---
          var legendPanelCollapsed = false;
          const header = document.createElement("div");
          header.className = "legend-header";
          const title = document.createElement("div");
          title.className = "legend-header-title";
          title.textContent = "Legend";
          header.appendChild(title);

          const collapseBtn = document.createElement("button");
          collapseBtn.className = "legend-collapse-btn";
          collapseBtn.textContent = "\u25BC";
          collapseBtn.title = "Свернуть / развернуть";
          collapseBtn.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
            e.stopPropagation();
            legendPanelCollapsed = !legendPanelCollapsed;
            legendElement.classList.toggle("is-collapsed", legendPanelCollapsed);
            collapseBtn.classList.toggle("is-collapsed", legendPanelCollapsed);
          });
          header.appendChild(collapseBtn);
          legendElement.appendChild(header);

          // --- Drag-to-move on header ---
          (function initLegendDrag() {
            var dragging = false;
            var startX = 0;
            var startY = 0;
            var panelStartLeft = 0;
            var panelStartTop = 0;

            header.addEventListener("pointerdown", function (e) {
              if (e.target === collapseBtn) return;
              dragging = true;
              startX = e.clientX;
              startY = e.clientY;
              var rect = legendElement.getBoundingClientRect();
              var parentRect = legendElement.offsetParent
                ? legendElement.offsetParent.getBoundingClientRect()
                : { left: 0, top: 0 };
              panelStartLeft = rect.left - parentRect.left;
              panelStartTop = rect.top - parentRect.top;
              header.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);
              e.preventDefault();
            });

            header.addEventListener("pointermove", function (e) {
              if (!dragging) return;
              var dx = e.clientX - startX;
              var dy = e.clientY - startY;
              var newLeft = panelStartLeft + dx;
              var newTop = panelStartTop + dy;
              var parent = legendElement.offsetParent || document.documentElement;
              var maxLeft = parent.clientWidth - legendElement.offsetWidth;
              var maxTop = parent.clientHeight - legendElement.offsetHeight;
              newLeft = Math.max(0, Math.min(newLeft, maxLeft));
              newTop = Math.max(0, Math.min(newTop, maxTop));
              legendElement.style.left = newLeft + "px";
              legendElement.style.top = newTop + "px";
              legendElement.style.right = "auto";
            });

            header.addEventListener("pointerup", function () {
              dragging = false;
            });

            header.addEventListener("pointercancel", function () {
              dragging = false;
            });
          })();

          // --- Scrollable body ---
          const body = document.createElement("div");
          body.className = "legend-body";

          if (hasTreeLegend) {
            payload.legend_tree.forEach((group) => {
              const groupWrap = document.createElement("div");
              groupWrap.className = "legend-group";
              groupWrap.appendChild(createTreeNodeButton(group, "pad"));
              const childrenWrap = document.createElement("div");
              childrenWrap.className = "legend-children";
              if (!legendTreeExpanded) {
                childrenWrap.classList.add("is-collapsed");
              }
              sortedLegendItems(group.children).forEach((child) => {
                childrenWrap.appendChild(createTreeNodeButton(child, "well"));
              });
              groupWrap.appendChild(childrenWrap);
              body.appendChild(groupWrap);
            });
            if (flatItems.length > 0) {
              const flatSection = document.createElement("div");
              flatSection.className = "legend-flat-section";
              sortedLegendItems(flatItems).forEach((item) => {
                flatSection.appendChild(createFlatLegendRow(item));
              });
              body.appendChild(flatSection);
            }
          } else {
            sortedLegendItems(flatItems).forEach((item) => {
              body.appendChild(createFlatLegendRow(item));
            });
          }

          legendElement.appendChild(body);
        }

        function syncLegendVisibility() {
          renderLegend();
        }

        function renderCollisions() {
          if (!collisionsPanelElement) {
            return;
          }
          collisionsPanelElement.innerHTML = "";
          const collisions = Array.isArray(payload.collisions) ? payload.collisions : [];
          if (collisions.length === 0) {
            return;
          }

          // --- Header: title + count + collapse button ---
          let collisionsPanelCollapsed = false;
          const header = document.createElement("div");
          header.className = "collisions-header";
          const title = document.createElement("div");
          title.className = "collisions-title";
          title.textContent = "Collisions";
          header.appendChild(title);
          const count = document.createElement("div");
          count.className = "collisions-count";
          count.textContent = String(collisions.length);
          header.appendChild(count);
          const collapseBtn = document.createElement("button");
          collapseBtn.className = "collisions-collapse-btn";
          collapseBtn.textContent = "▼";
          collapseBtn.title = "Свернуть / развернуть";
          collapseBtn.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
            e.stopPropagation();
            collisionsPanelCollapsed = !collisionsPanelCollapsed;
            collisionsPanelElement.classList.toggle("is-collapsed", collisionsPanelCollapsed);
            collapseBtn.classList.toggle("is-collapsed", collisionsPanelCollapsed);
          });
          header.appendChild(collapseBtn);
          collisionsPanelElement.appendChild(header);

          // --- Drag-to-move on header ---
          (function initDrag() {
            let dragging = false;
            let startX = 0;
            let startY = 0;
            let panelStartLeft = 0;
            let panelStartTop = 0;

            header.addEventListener("pointerdown", function (e) {
              if (e.target === collapseBtn) return;
              dragging = true;
              startX = e.clientX;
              startY = e.clientY;
              const rect = collisionsPanelElement.getBoundingClientRect();
              const parentRect = collisionsPanelElement.offsetParent
                ? collisionsPanelElement.offsetParent.getBoundingClientRect()
                : { left: 0, top: 0 };
              panelStartLeft = rect.left - parentRect.left;
              panelStartTop = rect.top - parentRect.top;
              header.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);
              e.preventDefault();
            });

            header.addEventListener("pointermove", function (e) {
              if (!dragging) return;
              const dx = e.clientX - startX;
              const dy = e.clientY - startY;
              var newLeft = panelStartLeft + dx;
              var newTop = panelStartTop + dy;
              var parent = collisionsPanelElement.offsetParent || document.documentElement;
              var maxLeft = parent.clientWidth - collisionsPanelElement.offsetWidth;
              var maxTop = parent.clientHeight - collisionsPanelElement.offsetHeight;
              newLeft = Math.max(0, Math.min(newLeft, maxLeft));
              newTop = Math.max(0, Math.min(newTop, maxTop));
              collisionsPanelElement.style.left = newLeft + "px";
              collisionsPanelElement.style.top = newTop + "px";
            });

            header.addEventListener("pointerup", function () {
              dragging = false;
            });

            header.addEventListener("pointercancel", function () {
              dragging = false;
            });
          })();

          // --- Scrollable body ---
          const body = document.createElement("div");
          body.className = "collisions-body";

          collisions.forEach((collision) => {
            const item = document.createElement("div");
            item.className = "collision-item";
            const label = document.createElement("div");
            label.className = "collision-label";
            label.textContent = String(collision.label || "");
            item.appendChild(label);

            // Meta row: SF + segments in one line
            const metaRow = document.createElement("div");
            metaRow.className = "collision-meta-row";

            // SF
            if (Number.isFinite(collision.separation_factor)) {
              const sf = document.createElement("span");
              sf.className = "collision-sf";
              sf.textContent = `SF: ${Number(collision.separation_factor).toFixed(2)}`;
              metaRow.appendChild(sf);
            }

            function createBadge(text) {
              const badge = document.createElement("span");
              badge.className = "segment-badge";
              badge.textContent = String(text || "—").toUpperCase();
              return badge;
            }

            // Parse multiple segments (comma-separated)
            const segA = String(collision.segment_a || "—");
            const segB = String(collision.segment_b || "—");

            // Create badge for segment A (handle multiple segments)
            segA.split(",").forEach((s, i) => {
              if (i > 0) {
                const plus = document.createElement("span");
                plus.style.cssText = "font-size:8px;color:#94a3b8;";
                plus.textContent = "+";
                metaRow.appendChild(plus);
              }
              metaRow.appendChild(createBadge(s.trim()));
            });

            // Arrow
            const arrow = document.createElement("span");
            arrow.className = "segment-arrow";
            arrow.textContent = "↔";
            metaRow.appendChild(arrow);

            // Create badge for segment B (handle multiple segments)
            segB.split(",").forEach((s, i) => {
              if (i > 0) {
                const plus = document.createElement("span");
                plus.style.cssText = "font-size:8px;color:#94a3b8;";
                plus.textContent = "+";
                metaRow.appendChild(plus);
              }
              metaRow.appendChild(createBadge(s.trim()));
            });

            item.appendChild(metaRow);
            item.addEventListener("click", () => {
              const hotspot = collision.hotspot;
              if (Array.isArray(hotspot) && hotspot.length >= 3) {
                const targetCenter = new THREE.Vector3(
                  Number(hotspot[0] || 0),
                  Number(hotspot[1] || 0),
                  Number(hotspot[2] || 0) * Z_DISPLAY_SIGN,
                );
                const offsetDistance = Math.max(
                  Number(payload.focus_collision_distance_m || 750),
                  100,
                );
                camera.position.set(
                  targetCenter.x + offsetDistance * 0.8,
                  targetCenter.y + offsetDistance * 0.6,
                  targetCenter.z + offsetDistance * 0.4,
                );
                controls.target.copy(targetCenter);
                camera.updateProjectionMatrix();
                controls.update();
                requestRender();
              }
            });
            body.appendChild(item);
          });
          collisionsPanelElement.appendChild(body);
        }

        function addLine(item) {
          const segments = Array.isArray(item.segments) ? item.segments : [];
          const role = String(item.role || "line");
          const materialOptions = {
            color: hexOrDefault(item.color, "#0f172a"),
            transparent: Number(item.opacity || 1.0) < 0.999,
            opacity:
              role === "cone_tip"
                ? Math.min(Number(item.opacity || 1.0), 0.62)
                : Number(item.opacity || 1.0),
          };
          if (String(item.dash || "solid") !== "solid") {
            segments.forEach((segment) => {
              if (!Array.isArray(segment) || segment.length < 2) {
                return;
              }
              const points = segment.map(displayPoint);
              const geometry = new THREE.BufferGeometry().setFromPoints(points);
              const material = new THREE.LineDashedMaterial({
                ...materialOptions,
                dashSize: Math.max(maxSpan * 0.025, 14.0),
                gapSize: Math.max(maxSpan * 0.015, 8.0),
              });
              registerEditableBaseMaterial(material, materialOptions.color, item.name);
              const line = new THREE.Line(geometry, material);
              line.computeLineDistances();
              scene.add(line);
            });
            return;
          }
          const positions = [];
          segments.forEach((segment) => {
            if (!Array.isArray(segment) || segment.length < 2) {
              return;
            }
            for (let index = 1; index < segment.length; index += 1) {
              const previousPoint = displayPoint(segment[index - 1]);
              const currentPoint = displayPoint(segment[index]);
              positions.push(
                previousPoint.x,
                previousPoint.y,
                previousPoint.z,
                currentPoint.x,
                currentPoint.y,
                currentPoint.z,
              );
            }
          });
          if (positions.length === 0) {
            return;
          }
          const geometry = new THREE.BufferGeometry();
          geometry.setAttribute(
            "position",
            new THREE.Float32BufferAttribute(positions, 3),
          );
          const material = new THREE.LineBasicMaterial(materialOptions);
          registerEditableBaseMaterial(material, materialOptions.color, item.name);
          scene.add(new THREE.LineSegments(geometry, material));
        }

        function addMesh(item) {
          const role = String(item.role || "mesh");
          const vertices = Array.isArray(item.vertices) ? item.vertices : [];
          const faces = Array.isArray(item.faces) ? item.faces : [];
          if (vertices.length === 0 || faces.length === 0) {
            return;
          }
          const positions = new Float32Array(vertices.length * 3);
          vertices.forEach((vertex, index) => {
            const [xValue, yValue, zValue] = displayXYZ(vertex[0], vertex[1], vertex[2]);
            positions[index * 3 + 0] = xValue;
            positions[index * 3 + 1] = yValue;
            positions[index * 3 + 2] = zValue;
          });
          const indices = new Uint32Array(faces.length * 3);
          faces.forEach((face, index) => {
            indices[index * 3 + 0] = Number(face[0] || 0);
            indices[index * 3 + 1] = Number(face[1] || 0);
            indices[index * 3 + 2] = Number(face[2] || 0);
          });
          const geometry = new THREE.BufferGeometry();
          geometry.setAttribute("position", new THREE.BufferAttribute(positions, 3));
          geometry.setIndex(new THREE.BufferAttribute(indices, 1));
          geometry.computeVertexNormals();
          const baseColor = hexOrDefault(item.color, "#94a3b8");
          const opacity = Number(item.opacity || 0.25);
          const material = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
            color: baseColor,
            transparent: true,
            opacity:
              role === "cone"
                ? Math.min(opacity, 0.12)
                : opacity,
            side: role === "cone" ? THREE.FrontSide : THREE.DoubleSide,
            depthWrite: false,
            depthTest: true,
          });
          material.toneMapped = false;
          material.forceSinglePass = true;
          const mesh = new THREE.Mesh(geometry, material);
          mesh.renderOrder = role === "overlap" ? 3 : role === "cone" ? 1 : 2;
          if (role === "overlap") {
            material.opacity = Math.min(opacity, 0.42);
          }
          scene.add(mesh);
        }

        function addVisibleCrossMarker(point, item) {
          const centerPoint = displayPoint(point);
          const half = Math.max(
            worldMarkerSize * Number(item.size || 6) / 16.0,
            4.0,
          );
          const positions = [
            centerPoint.x - half, centerPoint.y, centerPoint.z,
            centerPoint.x + half, centerPoint.y, centerPoint.z,
            centerPoint.x, centerPoint.y - half, centerPoint.z,
            centerPoint.x, centerPoint.y + half, centerPoint.z,
            centerPoint.x, centerPoint.y, centerPoint.z - half,
            centerPoint.x, centerPoint.y, centerPoint.z + half,
          ];
          const geometry = new THREE.BufferGeometry();
          geometry.setAttribute(
            "position",
            new THREE.Float32BufferAttribute(positions, 3),
          );
          const material = new THREE.LineBasicMaterial({
            color: hexOrDefault(item.color, "#0f172a"),
            transparent: Number(item.opacity || 1.0) < 0.999,
            opacity: Number(item.opacity || 1.0),
          });
          registerEditableBaseMaterial(
            material,
            hexOrDefault(item.color, "#0f172a"),
            item.name,
          );
          scene.add(
            new THREE.LineSegments(
              geometry,
              material,
            ),
          );
        }

        function addHoverSphere(point, item, hoverData) {
          const markerScale = Math.max(
            worldMarkerSize * Number(item.size || 6) / 8.0,
            5.0,
          );
          const mesh = new THREE.Mesh(hoverSphereGeometry, hoverSphereMaterial);
          mesh.scale.setScalar(markerScale * 0.52);
          mesh.position.copy(displayPoint(point));
          mesh.userData.hover = Object.assign(
            {
              color: hexOrDefault(item.color, "#64748b"),
            },
            hoverData || {},
          );
          hoverTargets.push(mesh);
          scene.add(mesh);
        }

        function addMarkers(item) {
          const points = Array.isArray(item.points) ? item.points : [];
          if (points.length === 0) {
            return;
          }
          const hoverItems = Array.isArray(item.hover) ? item.hover : [];
          const hoverOnly = Boolean(item.hover_only);
          const symbol = String(item.symbol || "circle");
          if (hoverOnly) {
            points.forEach((point, index) => {
              addHoverSphere(point, item, hoverItems[index] || {});
            });
            return;
          }
          if (symbol === "cross") {
            points.forEach((point, index) => {
              addVisibleCrossMarker(point, item);
              if (hoverItems[index]) {
                addHoverSphere(point, item, hoverItems[index]);
              }
            });
            return;
          }
          const markerSize = Math.max(
            Number(item.size || 6) * 1.85,
            7.0,
          );
          const positions = [];
          points.forEach((point) => {
            const vector = displayPoint(point);
            positions.push(vector.x, vector.y, vector.z);
          });
          const geometry = new THREE.BufferGeometry();
          geometry.setAttribute(
            "position",
            new THREE.Float32BufferAttribute(positions, 3),
          );
          const material = new THREE.PointsMaterial({
            color: hexOrDefault(item.color, "#0f172a"),
            transparent: Number(item.opacity || 1.0) < 0.999,
            opacity: Number(item.opacity || 1.0),
            size: markerSize,
            sizeAttenuation: false,
            map: ensureCircleMarkerTexture(),
            alphaTest: 0.35,
            depthWrite: Number(item.opacity || 1.0) >= 0.999,
          });
          registerEditableBaseMaterial(
            material,
            hexOrDefault(item.color, "#0f172a"),
            item.name,
          );
          scene.add(new THREE.Points(geometry, material));
          points.forEach((point, index) => {
            if (hoverItems[index]) {
              addHoverSphere(point, item, hoverItems[index]);
            }
          });
        }

        function addLabel(item) {
          const role = String(item.role || "label");
          const position = displayPoint(item.position || [0, 0, 0]);
          const offsetY =
            role === "well_label"
              ? 14
              : role === "reference_pad_label"
              ? 12
              : role === "reference_label"
              ? 10
              : 0;
          addSceneLabel(
            String(item.text || ""),
            position,
            String(item.color || "#0f172a"),
            "",
            { offsetY: offsetY },
          );
        }

        function escapeHtml(value) {
          return String(value || "")
            .replaceAll("&", "&amp;")
            .replaceAll("<", "&lt;")
            .replaceAll(">", "&gt;")
            .replaceAll("\"", "&quot;");
        }

        function formatTooltip(hover) {
          const lines = [];
          const swatchColor = hexOrDefault(hover.color, "#64748b");
          if (typeof hover.name === "string" && hover.name.trim() !== "") {
            lines.push(
              '<div class="tooltip-head">' +
                `<div class="tooltip-swatch" style="background:${swatchColor}"></div>` +
                `<div class="tooltip-title">${escapeHtml(hover.name)}</div>` +
              "</div>",
            );
          }
          if (typeof hover.point === "string" && hover.point.trim() !== "") {
            lines.push(
              `<div class="tooltip-kv"><strong>Точка:</strong> ${escapeHtml(hover.point)}</div>`,
            );
          }
          if (typeof hover.segment === "string" && hover.segment.trim() !== "") {
            lines.push(
              `<div class="tooltip-kv"><strong>Сегмент:</strong> ${escapeHtml(hover.segment)}</div>`,
            );
          }
          if (Number.isFinite(hover.md)) {
            lines.push(
              `<div class="tooltip-kv"><strong>MD:</strong> <span class="tooltip-mono">${Number(hover.md).toFixed(1)} м</span></div>`,
            );
          }
          if (Number.isFinite(hover.dls)) {
            lines.push(
              `<div class="tooltip-kv"><strong>DLS:</strong> <span class="tooltip-mono">${Number(hover.dls).toFixed(2)} deg/30м</span></div>`,
            );
          }
          if (Number.isFinite(hover.inc)) {
            lines.push(
              `<div class="tooltip-kv"><strong>INC:</strong> <span class="tooltip-mono">${Number(hover.inc).toFixed(2)} deg</span></div>`,
            );
          }
          return lines.join("");
        }

        const raycaster = new THREE.Raycaster();
        const pointer = new THREE.Vector2();

        function hideTooltip() {
          tooltipElement.style.display = "none";
        }

        function updateTooltip(event) {
          if (interactionActive || !pointerScreen.inside || hoverTargets.length === 0) {
            hideTooltip();
            return;
          }
          const rect = renderer.domElement.getBoundingClientRect();
          pointer.x = ((pointerScreen.x - rect.left) / rect.width) * 2 - 1;
          pointer.y = -((pointerScreen.y - rect.top) / rect.height) * 2 + 1;
          raycaster.setFromCamera(pointer, camera);
          const intersections = raycaster.intersectObjects(hoverTargets, false);
          if (!intersections.length) {
            hideTooltip();
            return;
          }
          const hoverObject = intersections[0].object;
          const hoverData = Object.assign({}, hoverObject.userData.hover || {});
          hoverData.color = hexOrDefault(hoverData.color, "#64748b");
          const html = formatTooltip(hoverData);
          if (!html) {
            hideTooltip();
            return;
          }
          tooltipElement.innerHTML = html;
          tooltipElement.style.display = "block";
          const offsetX = 14;
          const offsetY = 12;
          const rootRect = root.getBoundingClientRect();
          const tooltipRect = tooltipElement.getBoundingClientRect();
          const left = Math.min(
            Math.max(pointerScreen.x - rootRect.left + offsetX, 10),
            Math.max(rootRect.width - tooltipRect.width - 10, 10),
          );
          const top = Math.min(
            Math.max(pointerScreen.y - rootRect.top + offsetY, 10),
            Math.max(rootRect.height - tooltipRect.height - 10, 10),
          );
          tooltipElement.style.left = `${left}px`;
          tooltipElement.style.top = `${top}px`;
        }

        function render() {
          renderer.clear(true, true, true);
          renderer.render(scene, camera);
          updateAxesGizmo();
          updateLabels();
          updateTooltip();
        }

        function updateLabels() {
          const canvasRect = renderer.domElement.getBoundingClientRect();
          const labelRect = labelLayerElement.getBoundingClientRect();
          const width = Math.max(canvasRect.width || 1, 1);
          const height = Math.max(canvasRect.height || 1, 1);
          const offsetLeft = canvasRect.left - labelRect.left;
          const offsetTop = canvasRect.top - labelRect.top;
          sceneLabels.forEach((item) => {
            if (item.visible === false) {
              item.element.style.display = "none";
              return;
            }
            const projected = item.position.clone().project(camera);
            if (
              projected.z < -1.0 ||
              projected.z > 1.0 ||
              projected.x < -1.25 ||
              projected.x > 1.25 ||
              projected.y < -1.25 ||
              projected.y > 1.25
            ) {
              item.element.style.display = "none";
              return;
            }
            const screenX =
              offsetLeft + (((projected.x + 1.0) * 0.5) * width) + item.offsetX;
            const screenY =
              offsetTop + (((-projected.y + 1.0) * 0.5) * height) - item.offsetY;
            item.element.style.display = "block";
            item.element.style.left = `${Math.round(screenX)}px`;
            item.element.style.top = `${Math.round(screenY)}px`;
          });
        }

        function animate() {
          const controlsChanged = controls.update();
          if (controlsChanged || needsRender) {
            needsRender = false;
            idleFrameCount = 0;
            render();
            animationFrameHandle = window.requestAnimationFrame(animate);
            return;
          }
          if (idleFrameCount < 2) {
            idleFrameCount += 1;
            animationFrameHandle = window.requestAnimationFrame(animate);
            return;
          }
          animationFrameHandle = 0;
        }

        function enterFullscreen() {
          if (document.fullscreenElement === root) {
            document.exitFullscreen().catch(() => {});
            return;
          }
          if (typeof root.requestFullscreen === "function") {
            root.requestFullscreen().catch(() => {});
          }
        }

        function startAnimationLoop() {
          if (animationFrameHandle !== 0) {
            return;
          }
          idleFrameCount = 0;
          animationFrameHandle = window.requestAnimationFrame(animate);
        }

        (payload.lines || []).forEach(addLine);
        (payload.meshes || []).forEach(addMesh);
        (payload.points || []).forEach(addMarkers);
        (payload.labels || []).forEach(addLabel);
        renderer.domElement.addEventListener("pointermove", (event) => {
          pointerScreen = {
            x: Number(event.clientX || 0),
            y: Number(event.clientY || 0),
            inside: true,
          };
          requestRender();
        });
        renderer.domElement.addEventListener("pointerleave", () => {
          pointerScreen.inside = false;
          hideTooltip();
          requestRender();
        });
        controls.addEventListener("start", () => {
          interactionActive = true;
          hideTooltip();
          requestRender();
        });
        controls.addEventListener("end", () => {
          interactionActive = false;
          requestRender();
        });
        controls.addEventListener("change", requestRender);
        window.addEventListener("resize", resize);
        document.addEventListener("fullscreenchange", () => {
          resize();
          requestRender();
        });
        if (typeof ResizeObserver !== "undefined") {
          const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => resize());
          resizeObserver.observe(root);
        }
        if (fitButton) {
          fitButton.addEventListener("click", fitCamera);
        }
        if (fullscreenButton) {
          fullscreenButton.addEventListener("click", enterFullscreen);
        }

        // =====================================================================
        // Interactive target editing
        // =====================================================================
        const editTargetsBtn = document.getElementById("edit-targets-btn");
        const editToolbox = document.getElementById("edit-toolbox");
        const editPlaneSelector = document.getElementById("edit-plane-selector");
        const editScopeSelector = document.getElementById("edit-scope-selector");
        const editOperationSelector = document.getElementById("edit-operation-selector");
        const editUndoBtn = document.getElementById("edit-undo-btn");
        const editRedoBtn = document.getElementById("edit-redo-btn");
        const editResetBtn = document.getElementById("edit-reset-btn");
        const editSaveBtn = document.getElementById("edit-save-btn");
        const editWarningToast = document.getElementById("edit-warning-toast");
        const canEditTargets =
          editWells.length > 0 &&
          editTargetsBtn &&
          editToolbox &&
          editPlaneSelector &&
          editScopeSelector &&
          editOperationSelector &&
          editUndoBtn &&
          editRedoBtn &&
          editResetBtn &&
          editSaveBtn;

        if (canEditTargets) {
          editTargetsBtn.style.display = "";
        }

        let editModeActive = false;
        let editPlane = "xy"; // "xy" | "z"
        let editMoveScope = "point"; // "point" | "pair"
        let editTransformMode = "move"; // "move" | "rotate"
        const editHandles = []; // {mesh, pickMesh, previewMesh, wellIndex, pointType, dataPos[3], guide}
        const editReplanners = []; // FastReplan per well
        const editLineObjects = []; // THREE.LineSegments per well for preview
        const editLateralLabels = []; // midpoint label per well for current t1-t3 length
        const editRotationControls = []; // ring controls per well for t1-anchored XY rotation
        const editRotationPickMeshes = [];
        const editOriginalT1 = []; // original t1 [x,y,z] per well
        const editOriginalT3 = []; // original t3 [x,y,z] per well
        const editCurrentT1 = []; // current (dragged) t1 per well
        const editCurrentT3 = []; // current (dragged) t3 per well
        const editDirtyFlags = []; // boolean per well
        const editUndoStacks = []; // previous states per well
        const editRedoStacks = []; // undone states per well
        let editDragHandle = null;
        let editDragAxisOrigin = null;
        let editDragAxisDirection = null;
        let editDragStartPosition = null;
        let editDragStartAxisT = 0.0;
        let editDragPlane = null;
        let editDragMoveScope = "point";
        let editDragPlaneZ = 0.0;
        let editDragPointerOffset = null;
        let editDragHistoryStartState = null;
        let editRotateWellIndex = null;
        let editRotateStartAngle = 0.0;
        let editRotatePlaneZ = 0.0;
        let editRotateCenterDisplay = null;
        let editRotateHistoryStartState = null;
        let editRotateStartVector = null;
        let editHasAnyChange = false;
        let selectedEditWellIndex = editWells.length > 0 ? 0 : null;
        let editBroadcastChannel = null;
        const EDIT_SAVE_DEFAULT_TEXT = "Сохранить изменения";
        const EDIT_DELTA_EPS_M = 0.005;
        const EDIT_DELTA_AXIS_COLORS = {
          x: "#B91C1C",
          y: "#15803D",
          z: "#1D4ED8",
          total: "#475569",
        };

        function formatDeltaMeters(value, signed = true) {
          const numericValue = Number(value) || 0;
          const absValue = Math.abs(numericValue);
          const sign =
            signed && numericValue > EDIT_DELTA_EPS_M
              ? "+"
              : signed && numericValue < -EDIT_DELTA_EPS_M
                ? "-"
                : "";
          return `${sign}${absValue.toFixed(1).replace(".", ",")} м`;
        }

        function formatLengthMeters(value) {
          return formatDeltaMeters(Math.max(0, Number(value) || 0), false);
        }

        function copyEditPoint(point) {
          return [
            Number((point && point[0]) || 0),
            Number((point && point[1]) || 0),
            Number((point && point[2]) || 0),
          ];
        }

        function cloneEditState(wellIndex) {
          return {
            t1: copyEditPoint(editCurrentT1[wellIndex]),
            t3: copyEditPoint(editCurrentT3[wellIndex]),
          };
        }

        function originalEditState(wellIndex) {
          return {
            t1: copyEditPoint(editOriginalT1[wellIndex]),
            t3: copyEditPoint(editOriginalT3[wellIndex]),
          };
        }

        function pointsNearlyEqual(left, right) {
          if (!left || !right) {
            return false;
          }
          return (
            Math.abs(Number(left[0]) - Number(right[0])) <= EDIT_DELTA_EPS_M &&
            Math.abs(Number(left[1]) - Number(right[1])) <= EDIT_DELTA_EPS_M &&
            Math.abs(Number(left[2]) - Number(right[2])) <= EDIT_DELTA_EPS_M
          );
        }

        function editStatesEqual(left, right) {
          return (
            Boolean(left) &&
            Boolean(right) &&
            pointsNearlyEqual(left.t1, right.t1) &&
            pointsNearlyEqual(left.t3, right.t3)
          );
        }

        function isEditWellDirty(wellIndex) {
          return !editStatesEqual(cloneEditState(wellIndex), originalEditState(wellIndex));
        }

        function createUnitCircleGeometry(segments) {
          const positions = [];
          const safeSegments = Math.max(Number(segments) || 96, 16);
          for (let index = 0; index < safeSegments; index += 1) {
            const angle = (index / safeSegments) * Math.PI * 2.0;
            positions.push(Math.cos(angle), Math.sin(angle), 0);
          }
          const geometry = new THREE.BufferGeometry();
          geometry.setAttribute(
            "position",
            new THREE.Float32BufferAttribute(new Float32Array(positions), 3),
          );
          return geometry;
        }

        function createRotationArrowGeometry(angleRad, direction) {
          const radial = new THREE.Vector2(Math.cos(angleRad), Math.sin(angleRad));
          const turnDirection = Number(direction) < 0 ? -1.0 : 1.0;
          const tangent = new THREE.Vector2(
            -radial.y * turnDirection,
            radial.x * turnDirection,
          );
          const center = radial.clone().multiplyScalar(1.0);
          const tip = center.clone().add(tangent.clone().multiplyScalar(0.042));
          const baseCenter = center.clone().add(tangent.clone().multiplyScalar(-0.032));
          const wing = radial.clone().multiplyScalar(0.026);
          const positions = [
            tip.x,
            tip.y,
            0,
            baseCenter.x + wing.x,
            baseCenter.y + wing.y,
            0,
            baseCenter.x - wing.x,
            baseCenter.y - wing.y,
            0,
          ];
          const geometry = new THREE.BufferGeometry();
          geometry.setAttribute(
            "position",
            new THREE.Float32BufferAttribute(new Float32Array(positions), 3),
          );
          return geometry;
        }

        function editRotationControlLift() {
          return Math.max(maxSpan * 0.012, 10.0);
        }

        function editRotationModeEnabled() {
          return editModeActive && editMoveScope === "pair" && editTransformMode === "rotate";
        }

        function editRotationCenterDisplay(wellIndex) {
          const t1 = editCurrentT1[wellIndex] || [0, 0, 0];
          const t3 = editCurrentT3[wellIndex] || [0, 0, 0];
          const center = displayPoint([t1[0], t1[1], t3[2]]);
          center.z += editRotationControlLift();
          return center;
        }

        function createEditRotationControl(wellIndex, color) {
          const group = new THREE.Group();
          group.visible = false;
          group.renderOrder = 13;
          const safeColor = hexOrDefault(color, "#2563eb");

          const ringMaterial = new THREE.LineBasicMaterial({
            color: safeColor,
            transparent: true,
            opacity: 0.52,
            depthTest: false,
            depthWrite: false,
          });
          const ring = new THREE.LineLoop(createUnitCircleGeometry(128), ringMaterial);
          ring.renderOrder = 13;
          group.add(ring);

          const arrowMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
            color: safeColor,
            transparent: true,
            opacity: 0.68,
            side: THREE.DoubleSide,
            depthTest: false,
            depthWrite: false,
          });
          [
            [35, 1],
            [125, -1],
            [215, 1],
            [305, -1],
          ].forEach(([angleDeg, direction]) => {
            const arrow = new THREE.Mesh(
              createRotationArrowGeometry(
                (angleDeg * Math.PI) / 180.0,
                direction,
              ),
              arrowMaterial,
            );
            arrow.renderOrder = 14;
            group.add(arrow);
          });

          const pickMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
            color: "#ffffff",
            transparent: true,
            opacity: 0.0,
            side: THREE.DoubleSide,
            depthTest: false,
            depthWrite: false,
          });
          pickMaterial.colorWrite = false;
          const pickMesh = new THREE.Mesh(
            new THREE.RingGeometry(0.90, 1.12, 128),
            pickMaterial,
          );
          pickMesh.userData.editRotationWellIndex = wellIndex;
          pickMesh.renderOrder = 15;
          group.add(pickMesh);
          scene.add(group);
          editRotationPickMeshes.push(pickMesh);
          return {
            group: group,
            ring: ring,
            arrows: group.children.filter((child) => child !== ring && child !== pickMesh),
            pickMesh: pickMesh,
          };
        }

        function updateEditRotationControl(wellIndex) {
          const control = editRotationControls[wellIndex];
          if (!control) {
            return;
          }
          const visible =
            editRotationModeEnabled() &&
            Number.isInteger(selectedEditWellIndex) &&
            wellIndex === selectedEditWellIndex &&
            horizontalT1T3Length(wellIndex) > EDIT_DELTA_EPS_M;
          control.group.visible = visible;
          if (!visible) {
            return;
          }
          const radius = Math.max(horizontalT1T3Length(wellIndex), EDIT_DELTA_EPS_M);
          control.group.position.copy(editRotationCenterDisplay(wellIndex));
          control.group.scale.set(radius, radius, 1.0);
          const isDragging = editRotateWellIndex === wellIndex;
          if (control.ring.material) {
            control.ring.material.opacity = isDragging ? 0.78 : 0.52;
            control.ring.material.needsUpdate = true;
          }
          control.arrows.forEach((arrow) => {
            if (arrow.material) {
              arrow.material.opacity = isDragging ? 0.86 : 0.68;
              arrow.material.needsUpdate = true;
            }
          });
        }

        function syncEditRotationControls() {
          editRotationControls.forEach((_, index) => updateEditRotationControl(index));
        }

        function createEditDeltaLine(color, opacity) {
          const material = new THREE.LineDashedMaterial({
            color: color,
            transparent: true,
            opacity: opacity,
            dashSize: Math.max(maxSpan * 0.005, 6.0),
            gapSize: Math.max(maxSpan * 0.0035, 4.0),
            depthTest: false,
            depthWrite: false,
          });
          const lineObject = new THREE.LineSegments(new THREE.BufferGeometry(), material);
          lineObject.visible = false;
          lineObject.renderOrder = 12;
          scene.add(lineObject);
          return lineObject;
        }

        function initEditDeltaLabelDrag(labelItem) {
          if (!labelItem || !labelItem.element) {
            return;
          }
          let dragging = false;
          let startX = 0;
          let startY = 0;
          let startOffsetX = 0;
          let startOffsetY = 0;
          const element = labelItem.element;
          element.title = "Перетащите, чтобы сместить плашку от точки";
          element.addEventListener("pointerdown", function (event) {
            dragging = true;
            interactionActive = true;
            hideTooltip();
            startX = Number(event.clientX || 0);
            startY = Number(event.clientY || 0);
            startOffsetX = Number(labelItem.offsetX || 0);
            startOffsetY = Number(labelItem.offsetY || 0);
            element.classList.add("is-dragging");
            try {
              element.setPointerCapture(event.pointerId);
            } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
            event.preventDefault();
            event.stopPropagation();
          });
          element.addEventListener("pointermove", function (event) {
            if (!dragging) {
              return;
            }
            const dx = Number(event.clientX || 0) - startX;
            const dy = Number(event.clientY || 0) - startY;
            labelItem.offsetX = startOffsetX + dx;
            labelItem.offsetY = startOffsetY - dy;
            event.preventDefault();
            event.stopPropagation();
            requestRender();
          });
          const endDrag = function (event) {
            if (!dragging) {
              return;
            }
            dragging = false;
            interactionActive = false;
            element.classList.remove("is-dragging");
            try {
              element.releasePointerCapture(event.pointerId);
            } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
            event.preventDefault();
            event.stopPropagation();
            requestRender();
          };
          element.addEventListener("pointerup", endDrag);
          element.addEventListener("pointercancel", endDrag);
        }

        function createEditDeltaGuide(pointType, color) {
          const label = addSceneLabel(
            "",
            new THREE.Vector3(0, 0, 0),
            color,
            "edit-delta-label",
            { offsetX: 14, offsetY: 18 },
          );
          label.visible = false;
          initEditDeltaLabelDrag(label);
          return {
            pointType: pointType,
            lines: {
              x: createEditDeltaLine(EDIT_DELTA_AXIS_COLORS.x, 0.42),
              y: createEditDeltaLine(EDIT_DELTA_AXIS_COLORS.y, 0.42),
              z: createEditDeltaLine(EDIT_DELTA_AXIS_COLORS.z, 0.42),
              total: createEditDeltaLine(EDIT_DELTA_AXIS_COLORS.total, 0.32),
            },
            label: label,
          };
        }

        function updateDashedLineSegments(lineObject, segments, visible) {
          const positions = [];
          if (visible && Array.isArray(segments)) {
            segments.forEach((segment) => {
              if (!Array.isArray(segment) || segment.length !== 2) {
                return;
              }
              const start = displayPoint(segment[0]);
              const end = displayPoint(segment[1]);
              positions.push(start.x, start.y, start.z, end.x, end.y, end.z);
            });
          }
          lineObject.geometry.setAttribute(
            "position",
            new THREE.Float32BufferAttribute(new Float32Array(positions), 3),
          );
          if (typeof lineObject.computeLineDistances === "function") {
            lineObject.computeLineDistances();
          }
          lineObject.visible = Boolean(visible && positions.length > 0);
        }

        function hideEditDeltaGuide(guide) {
          if (!guide) {
            return;
          }
          guide.label.visible = false;
          Object.values(guide.lines).forEach((lineObject) => {
            lineObject.visible = false;
          });
        }

        function updateEditDeltaGuide(handle) {
          if (!handle || !handle.guide) {
            return;
          }
          const wellIndex = handle.wellIndex;
          const original =
            handle.pointType === "t1"
              ? editOriginalT1[wellIndex]
              : editOriginalT3[wellIndex];
          const current = handle.dataPos;
          const dx = current[0] - original[0];
          const dy = current[1] - original[1];
          const dz = current[2] - original[2];
          const total = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz);
          const selected =
            editModeActive &&
            wellIndex === selectedEditWellIndex &&
            total > EDIT_DELTA_EPS_M;
          const guide = handle.guide;
          if (!selected) {
            hideEditDeltaGuide(guide);
            return;
          }
          const viaX = [current[0], original[1], original[2]];
          const viaY = [current[0], current[1], original[2]];

          updateDashedLineSegments(
            guide.lines.x,
            [[original, viaX]],
            selected && Math.abs(dx) > EDIT_DELTA_EPS_M,
          );
          updateDashedLineSegments(
            guide.lines.y,
            [[viaX, viaY]],
            selected && Math.abs(dy) > EDIT_DELTA_EPS_M,
          );
          updateDashedLineSegments(
            guide.lines.z,
            [[viaY, current]],
            selected && Math.abs(dz) > EDIT_DELTA_EPS_M,
          );
          updateDashedLineSegments(
            guide.lines.total,
            [[original, current]],
            selected,
          );

          guide.label.visible = selected;
          guide.label.position.copy(displayPoint(current));
          if (selected) {
            guide.label.element.innerHTML =
              `<span class="edit-delta-head">${escapeHtml(handle.pointType)}</span>` +
              `<span class="edit-delta-row"><span>ΔX</span><span>${formatDeltaMeters(dx)}</span></span>` +
              `<span class="edit-delta-row"><span>ΔY</span><span>${formatDeltaMeters(dy)}</span></span>` +
              `<span class="edit-delta-row"><span>ΔZ</span><span>${formatDeltaMeters(dz)}</span></span>` +
              `<span class="edit-delta-row edit-delta-total"><span>Итого</span><span>${formatDeltaMeters(total, false)}</span></span>`;
          }
        }

        function syncEditDeltaGuides() {
          editHandles.forEach(updateEditDeltaGuide);
        }

        function horizontalT1T3Length(wellIndex) {
          const t1 = editCurrentT1[wellIndex];
          const t3 = editCurrentT3[wellIndex];
          if (!t1 || !t3) {
            return 0.0;
          }
          return Math.hypot(t3[0] - t1[0], t3[1] - t1[1]);
        }

        function t1T3Midpoint(wellIndex) {
          const t1 = editCurrentT1[wellIndex] || [0, 0, 0];
          const t3 = editCurrentT3[wellIndex] || [0, 0, 0];
          return [
            (Number(t1[0]) + Number(t3[0])) * 0.5,
            (Number(t1[1]) + Number(t3[1])) * 0.5,
            (Number(t1[2]) + Number(t3[2])) * 0.5,
          ];
        }

        function createEditLateralLabel(wellIndex) {
          const label = addSceneLabel(
            "",
            displayPoint(t1T3Midpoint(wellIndex)),
            "#1d4ed8",
            "edit-lateral-label",
            { offsetX: 0, offsetY: 0 },
          );
          label.visible = false;
          return label;
        }

        function updateEditLateralLabel(wellIndex) {
          const label = editLateralLabels[wellIndex];
          if (!label) {
            return;
          }
          label.position.copy(displayPoint(t1T3Midpoint(wellIndex)));
          label.element.textContent =
            `Длина ГС ${formatLengthMeters(horizontalT1T3Length(wellIndex))}`;
          label.visible =
            editModeActive &&
            Number.isInteger(selectedEditWellIndex) &&
            wellIndex === selectedEditWellIndex;
        }

        function syncEditLateralLabels() {
          editLateralLabels.forEach((_, index) => updateEditLateralLabel(index));
        }

        function handleDeltaLength(handle) {
          if (!handle) {
            return 0.0;
          }
          const original =
            handle.pointType === "t1"
              ? editOriginalT1[handle.wellIndex]
              : editOriginalT3[handle.wellIndex];
          const current = handle.dataPos;
          if (!original || !current) {
            return 0.0;
          }
          const dx = current[0] - original[0];
          const dy = current[1] - original[1];
          const dz = current[2] - original[2];
          return Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz);
        }

        function updateHandlePosition(handle, point) {
          const displayPosition = displayPoint(point);
          handle.dataPos = copyEditPoint(point);
          handle.mesh.position.copy(displayPosition);
          if (handle.pickMesh) {
            handle.pickMesh.position.copy(displayPosition);
          }
          if (handle.previewMesh) {
            handle.previewMesh.position.copy(displayPosition);
          }
        }

        function updateWellEditTargets(wellIndex, t1, t3) {
          editCurrentT1[wellIndex] = copyEditPoint(t1);
          editCurrentT3[wellIndex] = copyEditPoint(t3);
          editHandles.forEach((handle) => {
            if (handle.wellIndex !== wellIndex) {
              return;
            }
            updateHandlePosition(
              handle,
              handle.pointType === "t1"
                ? editCurrentT1[wellIndex]
                : editCurrentT3[wellIndex],
            );
          });
        }

        function applyEditState(wellIndex, state) {
          if (!Number.isInteger(wellIndex) || !state) {
            return;
          }
          updateWellEditTargets(wellIndex, state.t1, state.t3);
          editDirtyFlags[wellIndex] = isEditWellDirty(wellIndex);
          rebuildPreviewTrajectory(wellIndex);
          resetEditSaveButtonState();
          showEditFeedback();
          syncEditToolboxState();
          requestRender();
        }

        function pushEditUndoState(wellIndex, previousState) {
          if (!Number.isInteger(wellIndex) || !previousState) {
            return;
          }
          const currentState = cloneEditState(wellIndex);
          if (editStatesEqual(previousState, currentState)) {
            return;
          }
          const undoStack = editUndoStacks[wellIndex];
          undoStack.push({
            t1: copyEditPoint(previousState.t1),
            t3: copyEditPoint(previousState.t3),
          });
          if (undoStack.length > 60) {
            undoStack.shift();
          }
          editRedoStacks[wellIndex] = [];
          syncEditToolboxState();
        }

        function syncEditToolboxState() {
          if (!editUndoBtn || !editRedoBtn || !editResetBtn) {
            return;
          }
          const selectedIndex = Number.isInteger(selectedEditWellIndex)
            ? selectedEditWellIndex
            : null;
          const hasSelection = selectedIndex !== null;
          editUndoBtn.disabled =
            !editModeActive ||
            !hasSelection ||
            !Array.isArray(editUndoStacks[selectedIndex]) ||
            editUndoStacks[selectedIndex].length === 0;
          editRedoBtn.disabled =
            !editModeActive ||
            !hasSelection ||
            !Array.isArray(editRedoStacks[selectedIndex]) ||
            editRedoStacks[selectedIndex].length === 0;
          editResetBtn.disabled =
            !editModeActive ||
            !hasSelection ||
            !Boolean(editDirtyFlags[selectedIndex]);
          editPlaneSelector.querySelectorAll(".plane-btn").forEach((btn) => {
            btn.disabled = !editModeActive || !hasSelection || editTransformMode === "rotate";
          });
          editScopeSelector.querySelectorAll(".scope-btn").forEach((btn) => {
            btn.disabled = !editModeActive || !hasSelection;
          });
          editOperationSelector.querySelectorAll(".operation-btn").forEach((btn) => {
            btn.disabled =
              !editModeActive ||
              !hasSelection ||
              (btn.dataset.operation === "rotate" && editMoveScope !== "pair");
          });
        }

        function undoSelectedEdit() {
          const wellIndex = selectedEditWellIndex;
          if (!Number.isInteger(wellIndex) || editUndoStacks[wellIndex].length === 0) {
            return;
          }
          const previousState = editUndoStacks[wellIndex].pop();
          editRedoStacks[wellIndex].push(cloneEditState(wellIndex));
          if (editRedoStacks[wellIndex].length > 60) {
            editRedoStacks[wellIndex].shift();
          }
          applyEditState(wellIndex, previousState);
        }

        function redoSelectedEdit() {
          const wellIndex = selectedEditWellIndex;
          if (!Number.isInteger(wellIndex) || editRedoStacks[wellIndex].length === 0) {
            return;
          }
          const nextState = editRedoStacks[wellIndex].pop();
          editUndoStacks[wellIndex].push(cloneEditState(wellIndex));
          if (editUndoStacks[wellIndex].length > 60) {
            editUndoStacks[wellIndex].shift();
          }
          applyEditState(wellIndex, nextState);
        }

        function resetSelectedEdit() {
          const wellIndex = selectedEditWellIndex;
          if (!Number.isInteger(wellIndex) || !editDirtyFlags[wellIndex]) {
            return;
          }
          const currentState = cloneEditState(wellIndex);
          const originalState = originalEditState(wellIndex);
          if (editStatesEqual(currentState, originalState)) {
            return;
          }
          editUndoStacks[wellIndex].push(currentState);
          if (editUndoStacks[wellIndex].length > 60) {
            editUndoStacks[wellIndex].shift();
          }
          editRedoStacks[wellIndex] = [];
          applyEditState(wellIndex, originalState);
        }

        function initEditHandles() {
          const handleGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.0, 16, 12);
          const pickMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
            color: "#ffffff",
            transparent: true,
            opacity: 0.0,
            depthTest: false,
            depthWrite: false,
          });
          pickMaterial.colorWrite = false;
          editWells.forEach((well, idx) => {
            const surface = well.surface || [0, 0, 0];
            const t1 = well.t1 || [0, 0, 0];
            const t3 = well.t3 || [0, 0, 0];
            const color = well.color || "#2563eb";
            const config = well.config || {};

            editOriginalT1.push(t1.slice());
            editOriginalT3.push(t3.slice());
            editCurrentT1.push(t1.slice());
            editCurrentT3.push(t3.slice());
            editDirtyFlags.push(false);
            editUndoStacks.push([]);
            editRedoStacks.push([]);
            editLateralLabels.push(createEditLateralLabel(idx));
            editRotationControls.push(createEditRotationControl(idx, color));

            // Create FastReplan instance
            editReplanners.push(new FastReplan({
              surface: surface,
              config: {
                entryIncTargetDeg: config.entry_inc_target_deg || 86,
                maxIncDeg: config.max_inc_deg || 95,
                dlsBuildMaxDegPer30m: config.dls_build_max_deg_per_30m || 3.0,
                kopMinVerticalM: config.kop_min_vertical_m || 550,
                mdStepM: 30,
                basePoints: Array.isArray(well.base_points) ? well.base_points : [],
                originalT1: t1,
                originalT3: t3,
              },
            }));

            // t1 handle
            const t1Mat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
              color: color,
              transparent: true,
              opacity: 0.85,
              depthTest: true,
            });
            const t1Mesh = new THREE.Mesh(handleGeometry, t1Mat);
            t1Mesh.position.copy(displayPoint(t1));
            t1Mesh.visible = false;
            t1Mesh.renderOrder = 10;
            scene.add(t1Mesh);
            const t1PreviewMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
              color: color,
              transparent: true,
              opacity: 0.42,
              depthTest: false,
              depthWrite: false,
            });
            const t1PreviewMesh = new THREE.Mesh(handleGeometry, t1PreviewMat);
            t1PreviewMesh.position.copy(t1Mesh.position);
            t1PreviewMesh.visible = false;
            t1PreviewMesh.renderOrder = 8;
            scene.add(t1PreviewMesh);
            const t1PickMesh = new THREE.Mesh(handleGeometry, pickMaterial);
            t1PickMesh.position.copy(t1Mesh.position);
            t1PickMesh.visible = false;
            t1PickMesh.renderOrder = 11;
            scene.add(t1PickMesh);
            editHandles.push({
              mesh: t1Mesh,
              pickMesh: t1PickMesh,
              previewMesh: t1PreviewMesh,
              wellIndex: idx,
              pointType: "t1",
              dataPos: t1.slice(),
              guide: createEditDeltaGuide("t1", color),
            });

            // t3 handle
            const t3Mat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
              color: color,
              transparent: true,
              opacity: 0.85,
              depthTest: true,
            });
            const t3Mesh = new THREE.Mesh(handleGeometry, t3Mat);
            t3Mesh.position.copy(displayPoint(t3));
            t3Mesh.visible = false;
            t3Mesh.renderOrder = 10;
            scene.add(t3Mesh);
            const t3PreviewMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
              color: color,
              transparent: true,
              opacity: 0.42,
              depthTest: false,
              depthWrite: false,
            });
            const t3PreviewMesh = new THREE.Mesh(handleGeometry, t3PreviewMat);
            t3PreviewMesh.position.copy(t3Mesh.position);
            t3PreviewMesh.visible = false;
            t3PreviewMesh.renderOrder = 8;
            scene.add(t3PreviewMesh);
            const t3PickMesh = new THREE.Mesh(handleGeometry, pickMaterial);
            t3PickMesh.position.copy(t3Mesh.position);
            t3PickMesh.visible = false;
            t3PickMesh.renderOrder = 11;
            scene.add(t3PickMesh);
            editHandles.push({
              mesh: t3Mesh,
              pickMesh: t3PickMesh,
              previewMesh: t3PreviewMesh,
              wellIndex: idx,
              pointType: "t3",
              dataPos: t3.slice(),
              guide: createEditDeltaGuide("t3", color),
            });

            // Preview line (initially empty, hidden)
            const lineGeometry = new THREE.BufferGeometry();
            const lineMaterial = new THREE.LineBasicMaterial({
              color: color,
              transparent: true,
              opacity: 0.92,
              linewidth: 1,
            });
            const lineObj = new THREE.LineSegments(lineGeometry, lineMaterial);
            lineObj.visible = false;
            lineObj.renderOrder = 9;
            scene.add(lineObj);
            editLineObjects.push(lineObj);
          });
        }

        function updateHandleScales() {
          const handleScale = Math.max(maxSpan * 0.012, 12.0);
          editHandles.forEach((h) => {
            h.mesh.scale.setScalar(handleScale / 2.5);
            if (h.pickMesh) {
              h.pickMesh.scale.setScalar(handleScale);
            }
            if (h.previewMesh) {
              h.previewMesh.scale.setScalar(handleScale / 5.0);
            }
          });
        }

        function resetEditSaveButtonState() {
          if (!editSaveBtn) {
            return;
          }
          editSaveBtn.disabled = false;
          editSaveBtn.textContent = EDIT_SAVE_DEFAULT_TEXT;
          editSaveBtn.classList.remove("is-pending", "is-error");
          editSaveBtn.style.background = "";
        }

        function initEditToolboxDrag() {
          const header = editToolbox.querySelector(".edit-toolbox-header");
          if (!header) {
            return;
          }
          let dragging = false;
          let startX = 0;
          let startY = 0;
          let panelStartLeft = 0;
          let panelStartTop = 0;

          header.addEventListener("pointerdown", function (e) {
            dragging = true;
            startX = e.clientX;
            startY = e.clientY;
            const rect = editToolbox.getBoundingClientRect();
            const parentRect = editToolbox.offsetParent
              ? editToolbox.offsetParent.getBoundingClientRect()
              : { left: 0, top: 0 };
            panelStartLeft = rect.left - parentRect.left;
            panelStartTop = rect.top - parentRect.top;
            header.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);
            e.preventDefault();
          });

          header.addEventListener("pointermove", function (e) {
            if (!dragging) return;
            const dx = e.clientX - startX;
            const dy = e.clientY - startY;
            let newLeft = panelStartLeft + dx;
            let newTop = panelStartTop + dy;
            const parent = editToolbox.offsetParent || document.documentElement;
            const maxLeft = parent.clientWidth - editToolbox.offsetWidth;
            const maxTop = parent.clientHeight - editToolbox.offsetHeight;
            newLeft = Math.max(0, Math.min(newLeft, maxLeft));
            newTop = Math.max(0, Math.min(newTop, maxTop));
            editToolbox.style.left = `${newLeft}px`;
            editToolbox.style.top = `${newTop}px`;
          });

          header.addEventListener("pointerup", function () {
            dragging = false;
          });

          header.addEventListener("pointercancel", function () {
            dragging = false;
          });
        }

        function syncEditVisibility() {
          const selectedIndex = Number.isInteger(selectedEditWellIndex)
            ? selectedEditWellIndex
            : null;
          editHandles.forEach((h) => {
            const visible =
              editModeActive &&
              selectedIndex !== null &&
              h.wellIndex === selectedIndex;
            h.mesh.visible = visible;
            if (h.pickMesh) {
              h.pickMesh.visible = visible;
            }
            if (h.previewMesh) {
              h.previewMesh.visible =
                editModeActive &&
                !visible &&
                Boolean(editDirtyFlags[h.wellIndex]) &&
                handleDeltaLength(h) > EDIT_DELTA_EPS_M;
            }
          });
          setEditableBaseDimmed(editModeActive, selectedIndex);
          editLineObjects.forEach((lineObject, index) => {
            const isSelected = selectedIndex !== null && index === selectedIndex;
            const isDirty = Boolean(editDirtyFlags[index]);
            lineObject.visible = editModeActive && isDirty;
            if (lineObject.material) {
              lineObject.material.opacity = isSelected ? 0.92 : 0.42;
              lineObject.material.depthWrite = false;
              lineObject.material.needsUpdate = true;
            }
            lineObject.renderOrder = isSelected ? 9 : 8;
          });
          syncEditDeltaGuides();
          syncEditLateralLabels();
          syncEditRotationControls();
          syncEditToolboxState();
          syncLegendEditSelection();
        }

        function selectEditWell(index, options) {
          const nextIndex = Number(index);
          if (!Number.isInteger(nextIndex) || nextIndex < 0 || nextIndex >= editWells.length) {
            return;
          }
          selectedEditWellIndex = nextIndex;
          syncEditVisibility();
          syncEditToolboxState();
          if (options && options.focus) {
            if (fitCameraToEditWellTargets(nextIndex)) {
              requestRender();
              return;
            }
            const well = editWells[nextIndex] || {};
            const name = String(well.name || "");
            const targetBounds = focusTargets[`well::${name}`];
            if (targetBounds) {
              fitCameraToRawBounds(targetBounds);
            }
          }
          requestRender();
        }

        function setEditMode(active) {
          editModeActive = active;
          editTargetsBtn.classList.toggle("is-active", active);
          editToolbox.classList.toggle("is-visible", active);
          editTargetsBtn.textContent = active
            ? "Завершить редактирование"
            : "Редактировать точки";
          if (active && selectedEditWellIndex === null && editWells.length > 0) {
            selectedEditWellIndex = 0;
          }
          syncEditVisibility();
          if (!active) {
            editSaveBtn.classList.remove("is-visible");
            editWarningToast.classList.remove("is-visible");
          } else {
            resetEditSaveButtonState();
            showEditFeedback();
          }
          updateHandleScales();
          syncEditToolboxState();
          requestRender();
        }

        function setEditPlane(plane) {
          if (plane !== "xy" && plane !== "z") {
            return;
          }
          editPlane = plane;
          editPlaneSelector.querySelectorAll(".plane-btn").forEach((btn) => {
            btn.classList.toggle("is-active", btn.dataset.plane === plane);
          });
          syncEditToolboxState();
        }

        function setEditMoveScope(scope) {
          if (scope !== "point" && scope !== "pair") {
            return;
          }
          editMoveScope = scope;
          editScopeSelector.querySelectorAll(".scope-btn").forEach((btn) => {
            btn.classList.toggle("is-active", btn.dataset.scope === scope);
          });
          if (editMoveScope !== "pair" && editTransformMode === "rotate") {
            setEditTransformMode("move");
            return;
          }
          syncEditRotationControls();
          syncEditToolboxState();
        }

        function setEditTransformMode(operation) {
          if (operation !== "move" && operation !== "rotate") {
            return;
          }
          if (operation === "rotate" && editMoveScope !== "pair") {
            return;
          }
          editTransformMode = operation;
          if (operation === "rotate") {
            editPlane = "xy";
            editPlaneSelector.querySelectorAll(".plane-btn").forEach((btn) => {
              btn.classList.toggle("is-active", btn.dataset.plane === editPlane);
            });
          }
          editOperationSelector.querySelectorAll(".operation-btn").forEach((btn) => {
            btn.classList.toggle("is-active", btn.dataset.operation === operation);
          });
          syncEditRotationControls();
          syncEditToolboxState();
          requestRender();
        }

        function rebuildPreviewTrajectory(wellIndex) {
          const replanner = editReplanners[wellIndex];
          const t1 = editCurrentT1[wellIndex];
